description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CPack - DEB that runs on push and when a release is published. The workflow checks the commit message to determine if it should proceed. If not disabled, it uses a matrix strategy to build Debian packages for testing and sid distributions in separate ubuntu-latest jobs, each using a corresponding Debian container. For each distro, it installs dependencies, checks out the repository, builds the package, and uploads the artifact and to a release if published.
